g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the daily synthetic data generator in detail')

sendPrompt('What does the inventory_snapshot Gold table contain?')

svg.text: Layer 5 — MCP server · Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514 · Streamlit UI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is MCP and how does the server work in this project?')
